artDirection.mood: Dark atmospheric mystery with ethereal luminescence
artDirection.signature: Ethereal cyan ghost glow illuminating 1920s art deco noir cityscape

player.desc: Ghost detective Lucian Grey - translucent cyan figure in trench coat and fedora with glowing eyes, magnifying glass, and spectral wisps trailing below

enemy.desc: Shadow Manipulator - hooded dark purple figure with crimson glowing eyes, puppet control strings, and shadow tendrils emanating from cloak

bgLayer1.desc: Misthaven distant skyline - deep navy night sky with 80+ stars, full moon, art deco tower spires, distant city silhouette, harbor water with reflections, atmospheric fog layers

bgLayer2.desc: Misthaven street level - detailed art deco buildings with glowing windows, ornamental cornices, gas lamp posts with amber glow, cobblestone street, dark alleys, clock tower, jazz club neon sign, fog and wet reflections

uiHeart.desc: Credibility shield icon - art deco pointed shield with bronze trim, spectral eye symbol center, gradient blue fill with highlight and shadow

uiStar.desc: Soul Fragment crystal icon - amber gold diamond with faceted surfaces, art deco wing accents, sparkle effects, and ghost motif

powerup.desc: Ether Orb powerup - glowing cyan orb inside art deco hexagonal bronze frame with spectral eye symbol, energy pulse waves, and orbiting sparkle particles

effectHit.desc: Spectral disruption effect - radial multi-layer burst with white core, cyan shockwaves, crimson disruption layer, light rays, debris shards, and scattered evidence fragments

thumbnail.desc: Cinematic poster - Ghost detective Lucian investigating a glowing clue under moonlit art deco cityscape while the Shadow Manipulator lurks in a dark alley, rain streaks, gas lamps, evidence scattered, title text with bronze art deco frame
